name: LexisNexis Risk Solutions API
what_it_does: LexisNexis Risk Solutions REST API for insurance analytics, identity verification, fraud detection, and risk data. Enables AI agents to manage insurance risk scoring and underwriting data for P&C and life insurance decisions, handle identity verification and authentication for KYC/AML compliance, access fraud detection and claims analytics for insurance SIU and fraud management, retrieve motor vehicle records (MVR) and driving history for auto insurance underwriting, manage CLUE (Comprehensive Loss Underwriting Exchange) property claim history for property insurance underwriting, access criminal records and background check data for insurance and employment screening, retrieve business entity verification and data for commercial insurance and KYB, handle telematics and driving behavior data for UBI (usage-based insurance) programs, access social media and public record analytics for claims investigation, and integrate risk data with underwriting, claims, and compliance platforms.
use_cases: Automating underwriting risk scoring from insurance agents
Verifying identity for KYC from compliance agents
Detecting fraud from claims investigation agents
Pulling MVR data from auto insurance agents
not_for: Non-regulated industries without permissible purpose for consumer data
Marketing analytics without insurance/financial services context
Consumer self-service without regulated permissible purpose
best_when: An insurance carrier, financial services firm, or employer with permissible purpose wants AI agents to automate risk scoring, identity verification, fraud detection, and background data access for underwriting and compliance decisions.
avoid_when: CRITICAL REGULATORY RISK: LexisNexis Risk data is regulated consumer data — FCRA requires permissible purpose for credit-related data, adverse action notification, and reinvestigation rights. Automated adverse underwriting or employment decisions based on LexisNexis data require FCRA-compliant adverse action process. CLUE report access requires insurance-specific permissible purpose. Motor vehicle record (MVR) access is regulated by state DMVs and DPPA (Driver's Privacy Protection Act) — automated MVR access requires permissible purpose certification. AML/BSA-regulated uses require compliance program integration.

auth.notes: LexisNexis Risk Solutions uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. RELX Group subsidiary. Alpharetta, Georgia HQ. RELX Group (LSE: REL). LexisNexis Risk Solutions is separate from LexisNexis Legal (academic/legal research). 9,000+ insurance and financial services customers. Strong in insurance underwriting, claims, and fraud. Products include Attract, Verisk partnership, CLUE, InstantID. Competes with Verisk, TransUnion TLO, and Equifax for insurance and financial services risk data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-transaction and annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-query transaction pricing; enterprise volume contracts
pricing.notes: Alpharetta, Georgia. RELX Group (REL LSE). LexisNexis Risk Solutions separate from LexisNexis Legal. 9,000+ insurance/financial customers. CLUE insurance history, InstantID, MVR, fraud score products. Competes with Verisk Analytics and TransUnion for insurance data and analytics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API credential; volume-based

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL REGULATORY RISK: FCRA permissible purpose required for consumer data access; automated consumer data retrieval without permissible purpose documentation creates FCRA criminal and civil liability
DPPA Driver Privacy Protection Act — MVR access requires permissible purpose certification; automated MVR access without DPPA compliance creates federal criminal liability
CLUE permissible purpose — CLUE insurance history access limited to insurance underwriting and claims purposes; automated CLUE access for other purposes creates FCRA violation

Adverse action notification — automated underwriting decisions using LexisNexis data must provide FCRA adverse action notice and right to dispute; automated denial without adverse action creates FCRA violation

LexisNexis Risk vs. Legal product confusion — LexisNexis Risk Solutions (RELX risk division) is separate from LexisNexis Legal (academic/legal research); different products, different APIs, different access requirements
AML/BSA integration — automated KYC/AML screening using LexisNexis must be integrated into formal AML program with SAR filing capability; automated flagging without AML program creates BSA violations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance risk data. FCRA, GLBA, SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US. Regulated consumer credit and insurance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Regulated consumer data. FCRA, GLBA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consumer and insurance risk data.
